name: default
description: Machine-readable sibling of the prompt-tuner template: the system prompt, a sample input, a variables array (name, value), and a metrics array. Placeholder strings keep the file parseable; the agent expands the single variables element into one entry per variable.

slots.description: A representative input the prompt is tuned against.
Variable name. The variables array (see shape) carries one example element to clone per variable.
